differential_diagnoses: Neuroendocrine tumor (possible source of insulin-like peptides)
next_steps: Measure serum anti-insulin receptor antibodies (Type B insulin resistance evaluation)
Perform a specialized autoimmune workup (ANA, anti-dsDNA, complement profile)
Evaluation of the splenic lesion with imaging (e.g., PET-CT) or biopsy
Consider referral to a specialty center for potential metreleptin initiation
Optimize glycemic management with multidisciplinary team including specialized endocrinology
Avoid labeling as non-adherent due to objective clinical markers of severe insulin resistance
